note: The git-anchored genesis root for the EvaluationContract attestation chain (feature 008, round 4). Value is chain_root([]) — the domain-separated empty-history genesis (sha256 of 'deepthought/evaluation-contract/chain-genesis/v1'), the honest 'nothing' root that every real cohort history append-only-extends. Committing it here makes the chain BASE immutable and reviewable: git history supplies the external timestamp and review a pure validator cannot, so no operator can silently re-anchor the chain to a fresh, private, truncated genesis. Strict certification requires the first attestation's prior_attestation_root to equal this value (else GENESIS_UNANCHORED). To rotate the genesis (a deliberate, reviewable act) commit a new value here; the change is visible in git history.
